title: Corporate authority
doc_html:
§1133.  Corporate authority

A professional psychology corporation shall engage in no business other than the practice of psychology, but may hold property for investment or in connection with its psychology practice.  

Added by Acts 1980, No. 523, §1.
doc_text:
§1133.  Corporate authority
A professional psychology corporation shall engage in no business other than the practice of psychology, but may hold property for investment or in connection with its psychology practice.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 523, §1.
